About Me

Who I Am

I'm a motivated frontend developer currently pursuing my Bachelor of Computer Applications at ASM College, Pune. I enjoy turning ideas into real, functional web products that people actually use.

My focus is on writing clean, well-structured code and building interfaces that are both visually polished and easy to use. I care about the details — spacing, responsiveness, and user experience.

Beyond web development, I've explored C programming for systems-level thinking and earned certifications in AI from AWS and Infosys — because I believe full-stack awareness makes a better frontend developer.

I'm actively looking for internship opportunities where I can contribute, learn fast, and grow alongside a strong team.
